title: image to v5.38.0 and vendor storage v1.61.0 into it.
body:
Vendor storage v1.61.0 into  image, and then create image v5.38.0

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6436**

> LGTM, but please make a decision about https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/390 first.


IMO that is to late now, if we want synced stable releases we cannot introduce side effects by merging other PRs in between thus my suggesting to cut all releases from, the same branch and not rebase onto main between them.

Once the storage PR is merged we should never add additional content to image/common to ensure that the modules actually work together. Will the linked PR cause an issue I doubt it but I think it is important to stick to the established process.
